'''鈭歮-n-zh''' ('''manazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mone|mone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mone|mone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-n-zh
|-
! Lemma
| manazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:manazhithi|manazhithi]] || [[word:manazhiji|manazhiji]] || [[word:manazhishi|manazhishi]] || [[word:manazhi|manazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:manazhuthuth|manazhuthuth]] || [[word:manazhujuj|manazhujuj]] || [[word:manazhushush|manazhushush]] || [[word:manazh|manazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:manazhuthu|manazhuthu]] || [[word:manazhuju|manazhuju]] || [[word:manazhushu|manazhushu]] || [[word:manazhu|manazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:manazhufuth|manazhufuth]] || [[word:manazhufuj|manazhufuj]] || [[word:manazhufush|manazhufush]] || [[word:manazhuf|manazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:manazhethe|manazhethe]] || [[word:manazheje|manazheje]] || [[word:manazheshe|manazheshe]] || [[word:manazhe|manazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:manazhothoth|manazhothoth]] || [[word:manazhojoj|manazhojoj]] || [[word:manazhoshosh|manazhoshosh]] || [[word:manazh|manazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:manazhotho|manazhotho]] || [[word:manazhojo|manazhojo]] || [[word:manazhosho|manazhosho]] || [[word:manazho|manazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:manazhofoth|manazhofoth]] || [[word:manazhofoj|manazhofoj]] || [[word:manazhofosh|manazhofosh]] || [[word:manazhof|manazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:manazh忙th忙|manazh忙th忙]] || [[word:manazh忙j忙|manazh忙j忙]] || [[word:manazh忙sh忙|manazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:manazh忙|manazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:manazhathath|manazhathath]] || [[word:manazhajaj|manazhajaj]] || [[word:manazhashash|manazhashash]] || [[word:manazh|manazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:manazhatha|manazhatha]] || [[word:manazhaja|manazhaja]] || [[word:manazhasha|manazhasha]] || [[word:manazha|manazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:manazhafath|manazhafath]] || [[word:manazhafaj|manazhafaj]] || [[word:manazhafash|manazhafash]] || [[word:manazhaf|manazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:manazhasha|manazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomanazhasha|gomanazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimanazhasha|gokimanazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:manazhn眉sha|manazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomanazhnkn眉sha|gomanazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimanazhn眉sha|gokimanazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:manazhsh毛sha|manazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomanazhnksh毛sha|gomanazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimanazhsh毛sha|gokimanazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:manazhrosha|manazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomanazhnkrosha|gomanazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimanazhrosha|gokimanazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:manazhmusha|manazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomanazhnkmusha|gomanazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimanazhmusha|gokimanazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:manazhsherasha|manazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomanazhnksherasha|gomanazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimanazhsherasha|gokimanazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:manazhngasha|manazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomanazhnkngasha|gomanazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimanazhngasha|gokimanazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:manazhyasha|manazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomanazhnkyasha|gomanazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimanazhyasha|gokimanazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:manazhyamasha|manazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomanazhnkyamasha|gomanazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimanazhyamasha|gokimanazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:manazhn眉sh毛sha|manazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomanazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gomanazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimanazhn眉sh毛sha|gokimanazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:manazhn眉rosha|manazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomanazhnkn眉rosha|gomanazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimanazhn眉rosha|gokimanazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:manazhn眉musha|manazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomanazhnkn眉musha|gomanazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimanazhn眉musha|gokimanazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:manazhsh毛n眉sha|manazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomanazhnksh毛n眉sha|gomanazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimanazhsh毛n眉sha|gokimanazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:manazhsh毛rosha|manazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomanazhnksh毛rosha|gomanazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimanazhsh毛rosha|gokimanazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:manazhsh毛musha|manazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomanazhnksh毛musha|gomanazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimanazhsh毛musha|gokimanazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:manazhron眉sha|manazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomanazhnkron眉sha|gomanazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimanazhron眉sha|gokimanazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:manazhrosh毛sha|manazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomanazhnkrosh毛sha|gomanazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimanazhrosh毛sha|gokimanazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:manazhromusha|manazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomanazhnkromusha|gomanazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimanazhromusha|gokimanazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:manazhmun眉sha|manazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomanazhnkmun眉sha|gomanazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimanazhmun眉sha|gokimanazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:manazhmush毛sha|manazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomanazhnkmush毛sha|gomanazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimanazhmush毛sha|gokimanazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:manazhmurosha|manazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomanazhnkmurosha|gomanazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimanazhmurosha|gokimanazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:manazh|manazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙n忙zh|m忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homanazh|homanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙n忙zh|hom忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomanazh|hohomanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙n忙zh|hohom忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉manazh|n眉manazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙n忙zh|n眉m忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉manazh|n眉n眉manazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙n忙zh|n眉n眉m忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂manazh|n茂manazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙n忙zh|n茂m忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂manazh|n茂n茂manazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙n忙zh|n茂n茂m忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumanazh|lumanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙n忙zh|lum忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumanazh|lulumanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙n忙zh|lulum忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limanazh|limanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙n忙zh|lim忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimanazh|lilimanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙n忙zh|lilim忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komanazh|komanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙n忙zh|kom忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomanazh|kokomanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙n忙zh|kokom忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemanazh|kemanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙n忙zh|kem忙n忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemanazh|kekemanazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙n忙zh|kekem忙n忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
